DP.429.0001:
Wah!
You startled me good!\f
I think you’ll understand what I was
doing when you see this TM.\f
DP.429.0002:
Let me explain how that move works
without getting too technical.\f
Let’s say your opponent raises its
Defense using Harden.\f
Your Pokémon can use Psych Up to get
the same Defense boost as its foe.\f
Basically, your Pokémon gets the same
status boosts as its target.
DP.429.0004:
Trainer Tips\f
Even Veterans can get lost inside of
Mt. Coronet.\f
Trainers should check their supply
of medicine and items before trying\r
to venture through.
